job.title: Product Owner
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: As a Product Owner in Montpellier, you define the product vision and manage the backlog to maximise the value delivered to users. You work closely with development teams and stakeholders.
mission.1: Define and champion the product vision
mission.2: Write and prioritise user stories and the backlog
mission.3: Facilitate Agile ceremonies (sprint planning, review, retrospective)
mission.4: Act as the interface between business and technical teams
mission.6: Measure delivered value and product KPIs
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in computer science, management, or from a business school
profile.2: 3 to 7 years of experience in tant que PO ou Business Analyst
profile.3: Certification Scrum Product Owner (CSPO) is a plus
profile.4: Proficiency in JIRA, Confluence, and Agile tools
